title: Transmitter performance calibration systems and methods
abstract: An apparatus is disclosed that includes a transmit chain, a duplexer, a receive chain and a control circuit. The transmit chain is configured to generate a transmit signal at a transmit frequency. The duplexer is configured to pass the transmit signal to an antenna that generates a transmit leakage current into a received signal. The receive chain is configured to obtain the received signal and measure the leakage current from the transmit chain. The control circuit is configured to determine reduced performance parameters for the transmit chain based on the determined leakage signal, wherein the transmit leakage signal is inversely proportional to the reduced performance parameters.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1 . An apparatus comprising: a transmit chain configured to generate a transmit signal; a duplexer configured to pass the transmit signal to an antenna to generate a transmit leakage signal into a received signal; a receive chain configured to obtain the received signal and determine the leakage signal from the transmit chain; and a control circuit configured to determine reduced performance parameters for the transmit chain based on the determined leakage signal, wherein the transmit leakage signal is inversely proportional to the reduced performance parameters. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the transmit chain includes an interpolater and the reduce performance parameters include a reduced resolution for the interpolator. 3. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the transmit chain includes a radio frequency digital to analog converter (RFDAC) and the reduced performance parameters includes a reduced resolution for the RFDAC. 4. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the transmit chain includes a digital phase locked loop (DPLL) and the reduced performance parameters include a reduced resolution for the DPLL. 5. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the duplexer is configured to generate the transmit leakage below a selected amount. 6. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the receive chain includes a tuner configured to obtain the received signal at the transmit frequency, wherein the received signal substantially comprises the transmit leakage signal. 7. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the receive chain includes a low noise amplifier (LNA) configured to amplify the received signal. 8. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the duplexer is configured to pass an incoming signal from the antenna to the receive chain as at least part of the received signal. 9. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the control circuit is configured to iteratively determine the reduced parameters until a selected amount of power mitigation is obtained by the transmit chain. 10. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the control circuit is configured to iteratively determine the reduced parameters until the measured leakage signal is at or about a threshold value. 1 1 . The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the control circuit is configured to compare the measured leakage current with a noise mask and determine the reduced performance parameters based on the comparison. 12. The apparatus of any one of claims 1 -5, wherein the transmit chain includes a radio frequency digital to analog converter (RFDAC) configured to generate the transmit signal using a digital phase locked loop signal at the transmit frequency. 13. A communications device comprising: a transmit chain having: a computer core configured to extract phase and magnitude information from a data stream; an interpolator configured to generate an interpolator output signal from the extracted phase and magnitude information based on one or more performance parameters; a digital phase locked loop (DPLL) configured to generate a DPLL signal 

 based on the one or more performance parameters; a radio frequency digital to analog converter (RFDAC) configured to generate an analog signal based on the interpolator output signal and the DPLL signal; and a power amplifier configured to generate an amplified transmit signal from the analog signal based on the one or more performance parameters; and a control circuit configured to adjust the performance parameters from predetermined values to reduced performance values based on a measured transmit leakage signal at a receive chain. 14. The device of claim 13, wherein the one or more performance parameters include an interpolator resolution for the interpolator. 15. The device of claim 13, wherein the one or more performance parameters include an RFDAC resolution for the RFDAC. 16. The device of claim 13, wherein the one or more performance parameters include a DPLL resolution for the DPLL. 17. The device of any one of claims 13-16, wherein the control circuit is configured to compare the measured transmit leakage current with a noise mask and to adjust the one or more performance parameters based on the comparison. 18. A method of calibrating a communications device, the method comprising: generating a transmit signal at a transmit frequency using performance parameters; tuning a receive chain to the transmit frequency; leaking a portion of the transmit signal to the receive chain as transmit leakage; measuring the transmit leakage; and determining reduced performance parameters based on the measured transmit leakage. 19. The method of claim 18, further comprising comparing the measured transmit leakage with a noise mask to determine the performance parameters. 20. The method of any one of claims 18-1 9, wherein the determined performance parameters are used to generate a second transmission signal at the transmit frequency with reduced power consumption and an increased transmit leakage. 21 . A communications device comprising: a means for generating a transmit signal at a transmit frequency using performance parameters; a means for tuning a receive chain to the transmit frequency; a means for leaking a portion of the transmit signal to the receive chain as transmit leakage; a means for measuring the transmit leakage; and a means for determining reduced performance parameters based on the measured transmit leakage.
